name: Peachy Pork Chops
recipeIngredient: Garlic Salt and Pepper to Taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, sauté onion and celery in butter until tender; transfer to a large bowl.
2. Add bread cubes, poultry seasoning, sage, and pepper. Fold in the peaches.
3. Combine eggs, water, and parsley; add to bread mixture. Toss gently until well mixed.
4. Cut a pocket into each pork chop and spoon stuffing loosely into pockets. If necessary, tie with string to secure stuffing.
5. Brush chops with oil and sprinkle with garlic salt and pepper.
6. In a large skillet, brown chops on both sides.
7. Place remaining stuffing in a greased 13x9-inch baking dish. Top with chops.
8. Spread preserves over chops. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 45 minutes.
9. Uncover and bake an additional 15 minutes or until juices run clear. Remove string before serving.
